data.title: NSX Limited Announces Proposed Securities Issue
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from NSX Limited ( (AU:NSX) ).

NSX Limited has announced a proposed issue of securities, planning to release 114,552,337 ordinary fully paid shares. The issue is set to take place on May 20, 2025. This move is part of NSX Limited’s strategic efforts to enhance its market position and potentially increase its capital base, which could have significant implications for its stakeholders and influence its operational capabilities.

data.title: Audio Pixels Holdings Limited Announces Cessation of Securities
data.description:
Audio Pixels Holdings Limited ( (AU:AKP) ) has issued an announcement.

Audio Pixels Holdings Limited announced the cessation of 122,000 securities due to the expiry of options or other convertible securities without exercise or conversion as of April 16, 2025. This development may impact the company’s capital structure but does not indicate any immediate operational changes or strategic shifts.

More about Audio Pixels Holdings Limited

Audio Pixels Holdings Limited operates in the technology industry, focusing on the development and commercialization of digital speakers and audio solutions. The company is known for its innovative approach to sound technology and aims to revolutionize the audio market with its cutting-edge products.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

data.title: Palisades Goldcorp Highlights New Found Gold’s Queensway Project Report
data.description:
Palisades Goldcorp Ltd. ( (TSE:PALI) ) has shared an update.

Palisades Goldcorp Ltd. announced that New Found Gold Corp., in which it holds a significant equity interest, has filed a technical report for the Queensway Gold Project in Newfoundland and Labrador, Canada. This filing marks an important step in assessing the project’s mineral resources, potentially impacting Palisades’ investment value and positioning in the resource sector.

More about Palisades Goldcorp Ltd.

Palisades Goldcorp Ltd. is a resource investment company that focuses on junior companies in the resource and mining sector. The company aims to acquire equity in pre-IPO and early-stage public resource companies with high-quality projects that are either undeveloped or undervalued. Palisades targets companies needing financial resources to reach their potential, are undervalued in capital markets, or operate in low to moderate political risk areas. The company is listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the symbol ‘PALI’ and holds a diverse portfolio, including a 21.62% interest in New Found Gold Corp.

YTD Price Performance: -41.56%

Average Trading Volume: 40,283

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$46.08M

data.title: MA Credit Income Trust Releases March 2025 Investor Update
data.description:
An announcement from MA Credit Income Trust ( (AU:MA1) ) is now available.

MA Credit Income Trust has released its quarterly investor update for March 2025, emphasizing the importance of considering individual investment objectives before making decisions. The update highlights that neither the Responsible Entity nor MA Financial group guarantees capital repayment or specific returns, indicating inherent investment risks. The trust’s management involves various financial arrangements, including management and performance fees, reflecting its operational strategies and market positioning.

More about MA Credit Income Trust

MA Credit Income Trust operates in the financial services industry, focusing on investment management. It is managed by MA Investment Management Pty Ltd, a representative of MAAM RE Ltd, and is associated with Equity Trustees Limited, a subsidiary of EQT Holdings Limited. The trust primarily deals with credit income investments and is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange.

data.title: QBE Insurance Issues New Employee Incentive Securities
data.description:
QBE Insurance Group Limited ( (AU:QBE) ) has shared an update.

QBE Insurance Group Limited has announced the issuance of 511,730 unquoted securities under an employee incentive scheme. These securities are subject to transfer restrictions and will not be quoted on the ASX until the restrictions are lifted, reflecting QBE’s ongoing commitment to employee engagement and retention through equity participation.

More about QBE Insurance Group Limited

QBE Insurance Group Limited is a leading global insurance company, providing a diverse range of insurance products and services. The company focuses on offering solutions across various markets, including property, casualty, and specialty insurance, serving a broad spectrum of clients worldwide.

data.title: Aurelia Metals Secures Approval for Great Cobar Project
data.description:
Aurelia Metals Limited ( (AU:AMI) ) has provided an update.

Aurelia Metals Limited has announced the approval of its Great Cobar Project, with details to be lodged with the ASX. This development is expected to enhance the company’s operations and strengthen its position in the mining industry, particularly in the Cobar Basin. Stakeholders can anticipate potential growth and increased market presence as the project progresses.

More about Aurelia Metals Limited

Aurelia Metals Limited is an Australian mining and exploration company with a strategic presence in the Cobar Basin, New South Wales. The company operates three underground base metal mines across its Peak and Federation operations and is advancing the high-grade copper development known as the Great Cobar Project.

data.title: Stellar Resources Expands Tin Exploration in Tasmania with New Licence
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Stellar Resources Limited ( (AU:SRZ) ).

Stellar Resources Limited has successfully secured an exploration licence for the Ringville area, adjacent to the Renison Tin Mine in Tasmania, which is Australia’s largest tin-producing mine. This strategic acquisition enhances Stellar’s East Renison Project, which includes potential deposits of tin, antimony, copper, bismuth, zinc, and lead. The new licence complements Stellar’s existing projects and aligns with its goal to become a leading global tin producer, although the company acknowledges this as an aspirational target.

More about Stellar Resources Limited

Stellar Resources Limited is a company operating in the mining industry, primarily focusing on tin exploration and production. The company is actively involved in projects located in Tasmania, Australia, with a significant emphasis on expanding its footprint in tin-rich areas adjacent to established mining operations.

YTD Price Performance: -15.00%

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $21.07M

data.title: Lincoln Minerals Advances Minbrie Project with New Funding and Strategic Initiatives
data.description:
Lincoln Minerals Limited ( (AU:LML) ) has issued an update.

Lincoln Minerals Limited has successfully completed a placement to raise A$231,550 for its Minbrie Copper-Zinc Project, issuing shares at a premium and providing options to investors. The funds, along with an expected R&D tax rebate, will support exploration activities, including defining drill targets and relogging existing drill cores, potentially leading to a major discovery. The company is also implementing cost reduction measures, reducing monthly cash burn and aligning management interests with shareholders by compensating executives partially in shares. Lincoln remains focused on advancing its strategic projects and improving its capital position to enhance shareholder value.

More about Lincoln Minerals Limited

Lincoln Minerals Limited is a company operating in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral resources. Its primary products include copper and zinc, with a significant market focus on advancing its Minbrie Copper-Zinc Project in South Australia.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$8.23M

data.title: Rimfire Advances Scandium Drilling Amid Global Supply Constraints
data.description:
Rimfire Pacific Mining Limited ( (AU:RIM) ) has issued an update.

Rimfire Pacific Mining Limited is advancing its air core drilling program at the Currajong Scandium Prospect in the Fifield Scandium District, with 134 holes drilled to date. This initiative gains significance amid recent Chinese export restrictions on scandium, highlighting the district’s potential to provide a stable supply of this critical mineral, crucial for countries like the USA that rely heavily on imports.

More about Rimfire Pacific Mining Limited

Rimfire Pacific Mining Limited is an Australian company operating in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of scandium resources. The company is strategically positioned within the Fifield Scandium District, known for its potential as a secure supplier of scandium, a critical mineral used in various industries.

YTD Price Performance: -37.50%

Average Trading Volume: 1,995,232

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy
